arts.sum: Manchester City make the trip to Ipswich Town this weekend for the first Premier League meeting between the teams at Portman Road since 2001. Pep Guardiola’s side saw their three-game winning run ended in midweek, after blowing a two-goal lead to draw at Brentford.
